rationale_source: R4-RESIDUAL-2 PNW-only existing-first-mortgage extraction × F1.EL bank-vs-private distinction

mortgage_position.rationale: F1.MP new 2nd; new 2nd lender (Centum Private) is separate from existing 1st (RBC). LIST-C (BATCH 14): render-surface value '2nd'.

combined_ltv_computed.rationale: LIST-C-COMBINED-LTV-BUG-3-RESOLVED (BATCH 14): BUG-3-EXTENSION (b427906) extracts the new-2nd amount from '($145k) behind existing 1st' → the Combined-LTV row now RENDERS (deploy-confirmed 72.9% — (RBC $380,000 + $145,000)/$720,000). Gate-form non-boolean '0.729'→boolean true; the value verified via the prelim must_include.

must_include.rationale: ASSERTION-2: new 2nd lender distinct from existing 1st.

layer3_pending_decisions.scope: PNW-only existing-first-mortgage extraction: Phase 5 reveals if deferred residual still in-scope
